attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  OPERATING_UNIT
  ,INSTANCE_NAME
  ,CURRENCY
  ,ORG_ID
  ,LEDGER_ID
  ,APPLICATION_NAME
  ,SOURCE
  ,KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME
  ,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
  ,ITEM_NAME
  ,QUANTITY
  ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
  ,TRX_NUMBER
  ,TRX_CLASS
  ,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
  ,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  ,AMOUNT
  ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      
  ,UNIT_SELLING_PRICE
  ,CLAIM_START_DATE
  ,CLAIM_END_DATE
  ,ORDER_NUMBER                  
  ,ORDER_LINE_ID                 
  ,OA_FLAG
  ,SEQUENCE_ID
  ,GL_DATE
  ,DEBIT_AMOUNT
 ,CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS CREDIT_AMOUNT
 ,DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
 ,CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,7) ) AS CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
 ,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
 ,GL_TRANSFER_DATE
 ,DEBIT_CCID AS DEBIT_CCID
 ,CREDIT_CCID AS CREDIT_CCID
 ,DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCOUNT_CLASS
 ,FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER
 ,OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 ,OA_ATTRIB_ID
 ,OA_ITEM_NAME
 ,OA_QUANTITY
 ,OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,OA_PERCENTAGE
 ,SUB_SKU_AMOUNT          
 ,OA_CLAIM_START_DATE
 ,OA_CLAIM_END_DATE
 ,OA_ACCOUNTING_DURATION        
 ,OA_SEQUENCE_ID
 ,RECLAIM_VERSION
 ,CAST('DEBIT' AS VARCHAR(7)) AS DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE
 ,CONVERSION_DATE
 ,TRX_CURR_CODE
 ,RETRO_FLAG /* Added as a part of DEC2020 release*/     
 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_CG_MERK_DIST_ALL_INCR 
 
 UNION ALL

SELECT
 OPERATING_UNIT                
,INSTANCE_NAME                 
,CURRENCY                      
,ORG_ID                        
,LEDGER_ID                     
,APPLICATION_NAME              
,SOURCE                        
,KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME              
,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,ITEM_NAME                     
,QUANTITY                      
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
,TRX_NUMBER                    
,TRX_CLASS                     
,CUSTOMER_TRX_ID               
,CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID          
,AMOUNT               
,ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      
,UNIT_SELLING_PRICE            
,CLAIM_START_DATE              
,CLAIM_END_DATE                
,ORDER_NUMBER                  
,ORDER_LINE_ID                 
,OA_FLAG                       
,SEQUENCE_ID                   
,GL_DATE                       
,DEBIT_AMOUNT                  
,CREDIT_AMOUNT                 
,DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT        
,CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT       
,GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE       
,GL_TRANSFER_DATE              
,DEBIT_CCID                    
,CREDIT_CCID                   
,DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS
,CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS      
,FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER          
,OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID          
,OA_ATTRIB_ID                  
,OA_ITEM_NAME                  
,OA_QUANTITY                   
,OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
,OA_PERCENTAGE                 
,SUB_SKU_AMOUNT                 
,OA_CLAIM_START_DATE            
,OA_CLAIM_END_DATE              
,OA_ACCOUNTING_DURATION        
,OA_SEQUENCE_ID
,RECLAIM_VERSION 
,CONVERSION_DATE
,TRX_CURR_CODE               
,EDW_CREATE_DTM
,EDW_CREATE_USER
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM 
,EDW_UPDATE_USER
,RETRO_FLAG /* Added as a part of DEC2020 release*/     
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_MERK
WHERE EDW_CREATE_DTM >(SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE
 JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_CG_MERK_DIST_ALL' AND TABLE_NAME='EL_CG1_XXCFIR_REV_MERK')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,OA_ATTRIB_ID, DEBIT_CCID , CREDIT_CCID     , GL_DATE      
 			, DEBIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS  ,    CREDIT_ACCOUNT_CLASS  ORDER BY EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC)=1

SELECT 
 ST.OPERATING_UNIT
 ,ST.INSTANCE_NAME
 ,ST.CURRENCY
 ,ST.ORG_ID
 ,ST.LEDGER_ID
 ,ST.APPLICATION_NAME
 ,ST.SOURCE
 ,ST.KAFKA_TOPIC_NAME
 ,ST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 ,ST.ITEM_NAME
 ,ST.QUANTITY
 ,ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,ST.TRX_NUMBER
 ,ST.TRX_CLASS
 ,ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
 ,ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
 ,ST.AMOUNT               
 ,ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      
 ,ST.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE
 ,ST.CLAIM_START_DATE
 ,ST.CLAIM_END_DATE
 ,ST.ORDER_NUMBER                  
 ,ST.ORDER_LINE_ID              
 ,ST.OA_FLAG
 ,ST.SEQUENCE_ID
 ,ST.GL_DATE
 ,ST.DEBIT_AMOUNT
 ,ST.CREDIT_AMOUNT
 ,ST.DEBIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
 ,ST.CREDIT_ACCOUNTED_AMOUNT
 ,ST.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE
 ,ST.GL_TRANSFER_DATE
 ,ST.DEBIT_CCID
 ,ST.CREDIT_CCID
 ,ST.ACCOUNT_CLASS
 ,ST.FISCAL_PERIOD_NUMBER
 ,ST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 ,ST.OA_ATTRIB_ID
 ,ST.OA_ITEM_NAME
 ,ST.OA_QUANTITY
 ,ST.OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
 ,ST.OA_PERCENTAGE
 ,ST.SUB_SKU_AMOUNT                 
 ,ST.OA_CLAIM_START_DATE            
 ,ST.OA_CLAIM_END_DATE              
 ,ST.OA_ACCOUNTING_DURATION        
 ,ST.OA_SEQUENCE_ID  
 ,ST.RECLAIM_VERSION              
 ,ST.DEBIT_CREDIT_TYPE 
 ,ST.CONVERSION_DATE
 ,ST.TRX_CURR_CODE 
  ,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
  ,RETRO_FLAG /* Added as a part of DEC2020 release*/ 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_MERK_DIST_ALL ST
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP      ON NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  ST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_BUNDLE      ON NP_BUNDLE.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT=  ST.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=ST.ORDER_LINE_ID AND NSOL.SS_CODE='CG'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO ON NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=ST.ORDER_NUMBER
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL ON NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   = ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT ON NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT        = ST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB ON (NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = ST.LEDGER_ID  AND NSOB.SS_CODE ='CG')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC   ON (ST.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_DEBIT   ON (ENGLA_DEBIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = ST.DEBIT_CCID AND ENGLA_DEBIT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA_CREDIT   ON (ENGLA_CREDIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = ST.CREDIT_CCID AND ENGLA_CREDIT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
WHERE (
(ST.OA_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL AND NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT IS NULL)
OR NP_BUNDLE.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT IS NULL 
OR NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT IS NULL
OR EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT IS NULL
OR ENGLA_DEBIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID IS NULL 
OR ENGLA_CREDIT.CODE_COMBINATION_ID IS NULL 
OR NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NULL
OR NATIL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT IS NULL 
OR NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT  IS NULL 
OR (ST.OA_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IS NULL AND ST.OA_FLAG='Y')
OR (ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IS NULL AND ST.OA_FLAG='N')
)
